description: The LLM programming language. Write .kern once, compile to 12 targets (Next.js, React, Vue, Express, FastAPI, MCP, etc.). 98 static analysis rules with taint tracking. MCP server for AI agents. Up to 85% fewer tokens than TypeScript.
rules: KERN uses indent-based syntax (2 spaces, no tabs). Every node is one line. Children are indented deeper.
Props use key=value syntax. Strings use double quotes. Styles use inline {shorthand:value} blocks.
Handler blocks use <<< code >>> for inline code. Comments use // or #.
The 12 compile targets are: nextjs, tailwind, web, vue, nuxt, express, fastapi, native, cli, terminal, ink, mcp.
kern review runs 98 AST-based rules including taint tracking, OWASP LLM01 coverage, and concept-level analysis.
MCP servers written in .kern get auto-injected security guards (sanitize, pathContainment, validate, auth, rateLimit).
Use npx @kernlang/mcp-server or https://kernlang.dev/api/mcp for the MCP server endpoint.
Full language spec: https://kernlang.dev/llm/spec — machine-readable at https://kernlang.dev/llm
Always verify .kern syntax with the schema tool before writing. Use compile-json for structured error diagnostics.
